TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Suhuyya, title = Suhuyya, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Suhuyya} }

S.FORM: SuhuyyaÁīĘŤŹ≤šļě kakiliman Suhuyya" nu paw-ciya-li-ya ku kamu: –°–ĺ—Ą–ł—Ź,nu luma:Sofiya, IPA: IPA:('s…Ēfij…ź) )nu tung-u a kanatal paw-ciya-li-ya nu kanatal a kitidaan atu tabakiay a tukay,tida i su-huy-ya masabitangay a nutimulan, liwliw u buyu'buyu'an, 2006 amihcaan u tademaw nuheni sa 1,246,791. ÁīĘŤŹ≤šļě(šŅĚŚä†Śą©šļěŤ™ě:–°–ĺ—Ą–ł—Ź,ÁĺÖť¶¨ŚĆĖ:Sofiya, IPA:('s…Ēfij…ź) ) ,2006ŚĻīšļļŚŹ£1,246,791. e-se kalepacaw mahedek tu , paw-ciya-li-ta masacacay tu kukanatal nu heni sa. . Paw-ciya-li-ya henayšŅĚŚä†Śą©šļěÁéčŚúčśôāśúü namakay nu "pu-lin a nukasasulit", Paw-ciya-li-ya makaala tu nuheniay a kakasenengan, napatideng tu pangkiw a Paw-ciya-li-ya a kanatal. 1885 amihcaan mucuduh tu nuheni a tapang, kyu malecad tu naming ku kanatal, u e-ku u icelangay akanatal mucuduh sat u Paw-ciya-li-ya nu tabakiay a kanatal haymawsa maluayaw miliyas tu e-tu-man-anipikuwan kyu i 1908 amihcaan macakat mala ku-wang. Sayaway u palkan a nikalpacaw mabakuhac nu nadikudan sa, Paw-ciya-li-ya atu say-l-wiy-ya,mu-te-nay-kr-lu , si-la sepatay a kanatal mapulung maydih mialaw tu tul-ci i u-cu a tidaay a pala'. u Paw-ciya-li-ya maydih makaala tu ma-c- tun atu ay-cin-hay a minati "mangaleb kuydih tu sa-lu-ni-ka", misikul tu hitay amucuduh tayda i yi-se-tan-paw atukay, nika maludikud nu si-la atademaw makiayaw micumud i sa-li-ni-ka. u aw-siung tiku atu yitali nu tapang,makayi tu sayl-wiy-ya atu si-la misatabaki, mapulung amipuut, musakaku patideng tu al-pa-ni-ya. Kyu u Paw-ciya-li-ya cayay ka atu sayl-wi-ya, si-la numududucay nu nikalepacawan palatuh miedap, idaw kuni ala tu sakatusa palkan a nukalepacaw, ayda saylwiya, sila mademec masikeda, acunus nu tul-ci atu luma-niya. . Kyu u Paw-ciya-li-ya mahedaw naming ku nikaalaan, u timulay a tu-pu-lu-ciy sipakelit pabeli hank u lu-ma-ni-ya. naemekanś≠∑ŚŹ≤ aydaay a Paw-ciya-li-ya nu amisan nu mukasiay a mu-siya a walian, u Paw-ciya-li-ya nu timulan nu mukasiay a se-lay-se nu amisan. Paw-ciya-li-ya nu mukasi a binacadan nu se-lay-se atademaw. Pulung nu mihcaan 1 amihcaan nadikuda sa mala li-ma akanatal sa, u situngusay se-layse a kitidaan atu mu-si-ya a kitidaan. nadikudan sa pay-cab-tin a kanatal kumuleduay. u lala'ŚúįÁźÜ su-huy-ya nayi palkan nu subal a teban nu kitidaan, itoda i Paw-ciya-li-ya nu tipan, wiy-tu-sa nu amisan. su-huy-ya itini i danggay, liwliw u buyubuyu'an.su-huy-ya nu pala sa 1186 a pinhuwan kuli 457.9 a kuli, sausin u talakaw sa 550 kutalakw 1804 a batac . 550ÁĪ≥(1804ŤčĪŚįļ). su-huy-ya nu liwliw idaw ku tuluay ku tatahekalan nu buyu', u sakakabit tu lumeniay a bayu', ay-cin a bayu' nu ya-te-li a bayu' atu cung-u a sacukcuk. Suhuyya mikisaba tu sipanya mateli nu u-cu sakatusa atalakaway nu kitidaan nu kanatal. Suhuyyanu luwliw a balad inayay, idaw ku Vladaiska a balad atu Perlovskaabalad. ,śúČVladaiskaś≤≥ŚíĆPerlovskaś≤≥. i-se-ke-la abalad macaliway I suhuya nu walian. Suhuyya nu tukay alabu siyadahay nu nanum atu unsing, suhuyya nu tukay alabu idaw ku nisangaan nu naayaway asiku nu mikuliay tu banaw atu sasupedan tu nanum. suhuyya itida i paw-ciya-liya sajatusa atukay pu-lu hu ti-hu nutipan tu amisan 130 kung-li "81 in-li, tini i pul-ciy-se nu tipan 380 kung-li "236 ing-li, itini i paw-ciya-li-ya nu lumeniay a dadipasan nu bayu'a tukay, tatelhngan tu minatu nu tipan a wal-na 380 kung-li 236 ing-li. ). Su-huy0ya u laad atu paw-ciya-liyaatu tuluay a kanatal nu lilis cay pakaala tu 200 kung-li; micapi tu sayl-wiy-ya 55 a kung-li "34 inglinu ka-li-ti-na" u ma-ci-tun-sa 113 kung-li "70 ing-li nu ciy-ay-se-u" u silasa 183 akung-li "114 a ing-li nu ku-la-ta". demiadśį£ŚÄô suhuyya u suemetay nu enalay a demiay mukilu tu talakaway a caledes. Su-huy-ya sacaledesay sa abulad sa i waluay , nika sasienaway sa i 1 abylad . katukuh ayda 1936 a mihcaan , suhuyya nudemiad sausien ku akuti; sa 10.0 ¬įC (50 ¬įF). palsinteb hank u demiad sa nikaudad nu nanum sa 650 hawmi 25.6 a batac" , u lalud sa satalakaway , kasienawan saadidi'ay. 10.0 ¬įC (50 ¬įF). . u suhuyya tini i danggay nu talakaway, sisa suhuya i lalud u paw-viya-li-ya u sipiay a demiay ku yadahay, nika u lalud nu su-huy-ya a demiaad, u caledes talaw tu 40 ¬įC. 40 ¬įC.

tabakiaj a tukaj,tida i su-ńßuj-ja masabitaŇčaj a nutimur~…ĺan, r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw u buju Ē~ °buju Ē~ °an, **** amińß ¶aan u tad…ômaw nuńß…ôni sa *,***,***. ***(*****:*****,***:sofija, ipa:( Ē~ °s*fij*) ) ¶ija-r~…ĺi-ja makaar~…ĺa tu nuńß…ôniaj a kakas…ôn…ôŇčan, napatid…ôŇč tu paŇčkiw a paw- ¶ija-r~…ĺi-ja a kanatar~…ĺ. **** amińß ¶aan mu ¶uduńß tu nuńß…ôni a tapaŇč, kju mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu namiŇč ku kanatar~…ĺ, u …ô-ku u i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj akanatar~…ĺ mu ¶uduńß sat u paw- ¶ija-r~…ĺi-ja nu tabakiaj a kanatar~…ĺ ńßajmawsa mar~…ĺuajaw mir~…ĺijas tu …ô-tu-man-anipikuwan kju i **** amińß ¶aan ma ¶akat mar~…ĺa ku-waŇč. sajawaj u par~…ĺkan a nikar~…ĺpa ¶aw mabakuńßa ¶ nu nadikudan sa, paw- ¶ija-r~…ĺi-ja atu saj-r~…ĺ-wij-ja,mu-t…ô-naj-kr-r~…ĺu , si-r~…ĺa s…ôpataj a kanatar~…ĺ mapur~…ĺuŇč majdińß amu ¶uduńß tajda i ji-s…ô-tan-paw atukaj, nika mar~…ĺudikud nu si-r~…ĺa atad…ômaw makiajaw mi ¶umud i sa-r~…ĺi-ni-ka. u aw-siuŇč tiku atu jitar~…ĺi nu tapaŇč,makaji tu sajr~…ĺ-wij-ja atu si-r~…ĺa misatabaki, mapur~…ĺuŇč amipuut, musakaku patid…ôŇč tu ar~…ĺ-pa-ni-ja. kju u paw- ¶ija-r~…ĺi-ja ¶ajaj ka atu sajr~…ĺ-wi-ja, si-r~…ĺa numududu ¶aj nu nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan par~…ĺatuńß mi…ôdap, idaw kuni ar~…ĺa tu sakatusa par~…ĺkan a nukar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw, ajda sajr~…ĺwija, sir~…ĺa mad…ôm…ô ¶ masik…ôda, a ¶unus nu tur~…ĺ- ¶i atu r~…ĺuma-nija. . kju u paw- ¶ija-r~…ĺi-ja mańß…ôdaw namiŇč ku nikaar~…ĺaan, u timur~…ĺaj a tu-pu-r~…ĺu- ¶ij sipak…ôr~…ĺit pab…ôr~…ĺi ńßank u r~…ĺu-ma-ni-ja. na…ôm…ôkan** ajdaaj a paw- ¶ija-r~…ĺi-ja nu amisan nu mukasiaj a mu-sija a war~…ĺian, u paw- ¶ija-r~…ĺi-ja nu timur~…ĺan S.FORM: SuhuyyaÁīĘŤŹ≤šļě kakiliman Suhuyya" nu paw-ciya-li-ya ku kamu: –°–ĺ—Ą–ł—Ź,nu luma:Sofiya, IPA: IPA:('s…Ēfij…ź) )nu tung-u a kanatal paw-ciya-li-ya nu kanatal a kitidaan atu tabakiay a tukay,tida i su-huy-ya masabitangay a nutimulan, liwliw u buyu'buyu'an, 2006 amihcaan u tademaw nuheni sa 1,246,791. ÁīĘŤŹ≤šļě(šŅĚŚä†Śą©šļěŤ™ě:–°–ĺ—Ą–ł—Ź,ÁĺÖť¶¨ŚĆĖ:Sofiya, IPA:('s…Ēfij…ź) ) ,2006ŚĻīšļļŚŹ£1,246,791. e-se kalepacaw mahedek tu , paw-ciya-li-ta masacacay tu kukanatal nu heni sa. . Paw-ciya-li-ya henayšŅĚŚä†Śą©šļěÁéčŚúčśôāśúü namakay nu "pu-lin a nukasasulit", Paw-ciya-li-ya makaala tu nuheniay a kakasenengan, napatideng tu pangkiw a Paw-ciya-li-ya a kanatal. 1885 amihcaan mucuduh tu nuheni a tapang, kyu malecad tu naming ku kanatal, u e-ku u icelangay akanatal mucuduh sat u Paw-ciya-li-ya nu tabakiay a kanatal haymawsa maluayaw miliyas tu e-tu-man-anipikuwan kyu i 1908 amihcaan macakat mala ku-wang. Sayaway u palkan a nikalpacaw mabakuhac nu nadikudan sa, Paw-ciya-li-ya atu say-l-wiy-ya,mu-te-nay-kr-lu , si-la sepatay a kanatal mapulung maydih mialaw tu tul-ci i u-cu a tidaay a pala'. u Paw-ciya-li-ya maydih makaala tu ma-c- tun atu ay-cin-hay a minati "mangaleb kuydih tu sa-lu-ni-ka", misikul tu hitay amucuduh tayda i yi-se-tan-paw atukay, nika maludikud nu si-la atademaw makiayaw micumud i sa-li-ni-ka. u aw-siung tiku atu yitali nu tapang,makayi tu sayl-wiy-ya atu si-la misatabaki, mapulung amipuut, musakaku patideng tu al-pa-ni-ya. Kyu u Paw-ciya-li-ya cayay ka atu sayl-wi-ya, si-la numududucay nu nikalepacawan palatuh miedap, idaw kuni ala tu sakatusa palkan a nukalepacaw, ayda saylwiya, sila mademec masikeda, acunus nu tul-ci atu luma-niya. . Kyu u Paw-ciya-li-ya mahedaw naming ku nikaalaan, u timulay a tu-pu-lu-ciy sipakelit pabeli hank u lu-ma-ni-ya. naemekanś≠∑ŚŹ≤ aydaay a Paw-ciya-li-ya nu amisan nu mukasiay a mu-siya a walian, u Paw-ciya-li-ya nu timulan nu mukasiay a se-lay-se nu amisan. Paw-ciya-li-ya nu mukasi a binacadan nu se-lay-se atademaw. Pulung nu mihcaan 1 amihcaan nadikuda sa mala li-ma akanatal sa, u situngusay se-layse a kitidaan atu mu-si-ya a kitidaan. nadikudan sa pay-cab-tin a kanatal kumuleduay. u lala'ŚúįÁźÜ su-huy-ya nayi palkan nu subal a teban nu kitidaan, itoda i Paw-ciya-li-ya nu tipan, wiy-tu-sa nu amisan. su-huy-ya itini i danggay, liwliw u buyubuyu'an.su-huy-ya nu pala sa 1186 a pinhuwan kuli 457.9 a kuli, sausin u talakaw sa 550 kutalakw 1804 a batac . 550ÁĪ≥(1804ŤčĪŚįļ). su-huy-ya nu liwliw idaw ku tuluay ku tatahekalan nu buyu', u sakakabit tu lumeniay a bayu', ay-cin a bayu' nu ya-te-li a bayu' atu cung-u a sacukcuk. Suhuyya mikisaba tu sipanya mateli nu u-cu sakatusa atalakaway nu kitidaan nu kanatal. Suhuyyanu luwliw a balad inayay, idaw ku Vladaiska a balad atu Perlovskaabalad. ,śúČVladaiskaś≤≥ŚíĆPerlovskaś≤≥. i-se-ke-la abalad macaliway I suhuya nu walian. Suhuyya nu tukay alabu siyadahay nu nanum atu unsing, suhuyya nu tukay alabu idaw ku nisangaan nu naayaway asiku nu mikuliay tu banaw atu sasupedan tu nanum. suhuyya itida i paw-ciya-liya sajatusa atukay pu-lu hu ti-hu nutipan tu amisan 130 kung-li "81 in-li, tini i pul-ciy-se nu tipan 380 kung-li "236 ing-li, itini i paw-ciya-li-ya nu lumeniay a dadipasan nu bayu'a tukay, tatelhngan tu minatu nu tipan a wal-na 380 kung-li 236 ing-li. ). Su-huy0ya u laad atu paw-ciya-liyaatu tuluay a kanatal nu lilis cay pakaala tu 200 kung-li; micapi tu sayl-wiy-ya 55 a kung-li "34 inglinu ka-li-ti-na" u ma-ci-tun-sa 113 kung-li "70 ing-li nu ciy-ay-se-u" u silasa 183 akung-li "114 a ing-li nu ku-la-ta". demiadśį£ŚÄô suhuyya u suemetay nu enalay a demiay mukilu tu talakaway a caledes. Su-huy-ya sacaledesay sa abulad sa i waluay , nika sasienaway sa i 1 abylad . katukuh ayda 1936 a mihcaan , suhuyya nudemiad sausien ku akuti; sa 10.0 ¬įC (50 ¬įF). palsinteb hank u demiad sa nikaudad nu nanum sa 650 hawmi 25.6 a batac" , u lalud sa satalakaway , kasienawan saadidi'ay. 10.0 ¬įC (50 ¬įF). . u suhuyya tini i danggay nu talakaway, sisa suhuya i lalud u paw-viya-li-ya u sipiay a demiay ku yadahay, nika u lalud nu su-huy-ya a demiaad, u caledes talaw tu 40 ¬įC. 40 ¬įC.
